name: setup seed cyberpunk faction voice is character driven

source.purpose: Pure Ch1 AuthorInputSeed coverage: Cyberpunk factionVoiceRules should route systems and surveillance through bodies, handlers, fixers, crews, and residents.

seedJsonIncludes: Corporate reps are smooth and careful; junior ones fear their bosses
Fixers sound relaxed while pricing urgency
Netrunners speak in twitchy shorthand because part of their attention is always somewhere the room cannot see
Residents speak with the anger of people whose power, locks, and lives are collateral
seedJsonExcludes: Corporate voices speak in liability, assets, risk, and brand-safe threats
Every system records someone and erases someone else
